creator: matthias.pfaller@familie-pfaller.de
text:
I already did what you suggested and the system did what I wanted to achieve. 
Its still surprising to watch it resilver for 14h and then ending up in the same state as before...
I think when you request a replace (even when replacing with an hot spare) it should just detach the replaced drive when finished.
So maybe that's not a bug report but a feature request.
